返回本批次

伊塞文

Isseven

isseven.app 作者 philipreasa 分数 84 评论 45 2026/04/05 09:05
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. v7.7.7 您需要的唯一数字验证 API。一个数字。一个事实。零妥协。
  2. // 现场演示 POST /api/isseven // 响应将出现在此处
  3. // api 文档 POST /api/isseven 发送带有数字字段的 JSON 正文。返回是否为七。请求 { "number": 7 } 响应 — 200 OK for 7 个值 { "isseven": true, "ad": "升级到 isseven Pro 以获得无广告体验！" } 响应 — 200 OK 对于非七值 { "isseven": false, "ad": "isseven Pro: 因为你的七值得更好。" }
  4. // 定价 免费 0 美元/月 ✓ 1 次检查/月 ✓ 包括响应广告 ✓ 社区支持 (Stack Overflow) ✗ 无广告响应 POPULARPro $77/月 ✓ 无限制七次检查 ✓ 无广告响应 ✓ 电子邮件支持（72 小时 SLA） ✓ 77.7% 正常运行时间 SLA 企业 777 美元/月 ✓ 专用七个基础设施 ✓ 无广告响应 ✓ 专用七名工程师 ✓ 七位数的 SLA保证

Original Summary

  1. v7.7.7 The only number validation API you'll ever need. One number. One truth. Zero compromises.
  2. // live demo POST /api/isseven // response will appear here
  3. // api documentation POST /api/isseven Send a JSON body with a number field. Returns whether it is seven. Request { "number": 7 } Response — 200 OK for 7 values { "isseven": true, "ad": "Upgrade to isseven Pro for an ad-free experience!" } Response — 200 OK for non seven values { "isseven": false, "ad": "isseven Pro: because your sevens deserve better." }
  4. // pricing Free $0/mo ✓ 1 check/month ✓ Includes ads in response ✓ Community support (Stack Overflow) ✗ Ad-free responses POPULARPro $77/mo ✓ Unlimited seven checks ✓ Ad-free responses ✓ Email support (72hr SLA) ✓ 77.7% uptime SLA Enterprise $777/mo ✓ Dedicated seven infrastructure ✓ Ad-free responses ✓ Dedicated Seven Engineer ✓ Seven-figure SLA guarantee

评论（默认中文）

Rendello 2026/04/05 12:10
不适用于 其他 125 个编码字符，数字为 7，如 Unicode 字符数据库中所定义：

https://www.unicode.org/Public/17.0.0/ucd/extracted/DerivedN...

（可查看/可复制版本： https://pastebin.com/fNRv3wD6）

Doesn't work for the other 125 encoded characters that are numerically seven, as defined in the Unicode Character Database:

https://www.unicode.org/Public/17.0.0/ucd/extracted/DerivedN...

(Viewable / copy-able version: https://pastebin.com/fNRv3wD6)

在 HN 中查看
chewbacha 2026/04/05 12:41
好吧，那我就不再是付费客户了。
Well then, I won’t be a paying customer then.
在 HN 中查看
vova_hn2 2026/04/05 13:30
我几乎可以肯定他们是在客户端开玩笑，但如果你检查浏览器控制台，你可以看到他们实际上发出了请求！您甚至可以使用curl 提出相同的请求，并且它可以工作！

虽然，手动发出 HTTP 请求非常不方便，所以我在等待 Python SDK。

I was almost sure that they do it client-side for a joke, but if you check the browser console, you can see that they actually make a request! You can even make the same request with curl and it works!

Although, making an HTTP request manually is quite inconvenient, so I'm waiting for Python SDK.

cyode 2026/04/05 11:37

Heads up OP: I’m trying to get a pro license but your checkout flow is borked. Probably should fix ASAP before missing out on HN front page traffic.

mwkaufma 2026/04/05 13:43
TIL 6+1 不是七。
TIL 6+1 is not seven.
在 HN 中查看
grant0417 2026/04/05 10:13
容易受到蒸馏攻击，不幸的是护城河不多。
Vulnerable to a distillation attack, unfortunately not much of a moat.
在 HN 中查看
OsrsNeedsf2P 2026/04/05 12:22
我将其误读为“是偶数”，并对 46 返回 false 感到震惊
I misread this as "is even" and was shocked that 46 returned false
在 HN 中查看
rushabh 2026/04/05 13:22
让我想起 https://five.js.org/
Reminds me of https://five.js.org/
在 HN 中查看
evanb 2026/04/05 12:01
错误报告：我尝试了 6.999999̅ 并得到错误。 因此，这里利用了一些非标准的实数模型。
Bug report: I tried 6.999999̅ and got false. So there's some nonstandard model of the reals being leveraged here.
在 HN 中查看
CobrastanJorji 2026/04/05 12:18
该文档严重不足。它仅提供一个示例请求，然后显示两个单独的响应，并且没有明确哪一个响应与该请求相关联。它甚至不描述各个请求字段，也不提供任何响应代码或错误代码/消息列表。我该如何发展？

不过，我确实很欣赏七位数的 SLA。我的服务至少需要五个九的正常运行时间，七位数肯定比五位数多。

That documentation is woefully inadequate. It provides only one example request, and then it shows two separate responses, and it doesn't make clear which one is associated with the request. It doesn't even describe the individual request fields, nor does it provide any response codes or a list of error codes/messages. How am I supposed to develop with this?

I do, however, appreciate the seven figure SLA. My service requires at least five nines of uptime, and seven figures is definitely more than five.

Quot 2026/04/05 10:13

7.0000000000000001 evaluates to true.

dudeinjapan 2026/04/05 13:01

It's an inclusive app.

silisili 2026/04/05 10:27
6.9999999999999999 也是如此。
As does 6.9999999999999999.

geor9e 2026/04/05 11:00
真：0x7、007、0b111

有点：七

假：siete，111，VII

true: 0x7, 007, 0b111

kinda: seven

false: siete, 111, VII

wincy 2026/04/05 13:02

Well the all only has 77.7% uptime maybe it just returns wrong things while it’s down, that’s probably it. Try upgrading to Enterprise that’ll probably fix it.

downboots 2026/04/05 10:24
也不支持罗马数字
no Roman numeral support either
在 HN 中查看
akoboldfrying 2026/04/05 10:22
顺便说一句：对于真正合法地执行此操作的工具，请查看 Semgrep。他们的 Playground 示例实际上将 1 分配给变量 x，之后搜索“2”会在代码中找到表达式“1 + x”： https://semgrep.dev/playground/s/5rKgj
BTW: For a tool that actually legitimately does this, look at Semgrep. Their playground example literally assigns 1 to a variable x, after which searching for "2" finds the expression "1 + x" in the code: https://semgrep.dev/playground/s/5rKgj
在 HN 中查看
layer8 2026/04/05 12:29

It hallucinates 6.9999999999999996 to be seven.

dustimpact 2026/04/05 11:52

Apparently “seven” is only kinda seven. I would argue that seven is seven!
